name: Roast Beef Hash (Ny Times)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Cold roast beef (about 3 cups chopped)
recipeInstructions:
From "The New York Times Cook Book."
Chop or grind the roast beef. Add the remaining ingredients and mix well.
Turn off heat source.
Pour mixture into a greased, preheated frying pan.
Cook, stirring occasionally, until thoroughly hot.
Let cook until brown and crusted underneath.
Gently fold over as if an omelet.
Transfer to a hot platter.
